summary: Iteration 8 testing complete. All 4 bug fixes verified: 1) Supplier/expense empty branch_id stores null (not empty string), 2) Customer balance tracking with cash/bank/credit columns and Receive button, 3) Credit report includes discount and final_amount fields, 4) Document type categories (type=document). Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with test@example.com/password123 returns access_token
Backend: POST /api/suppliers with empty branch_id stores null (not empty string)
Backend: POST /api/expenses with empty branch_id/supplier_id stores null
Backend: GET /api/customers-balance returns cash/bank/credit_balance per customer
Backend: GET /api/customers/{id}/balance returns detailed customer balance
Backend: GET /api/reports/credit-sales includes discount and final_amount fields
Backend: POST /api/categories type=document creates document type category
Backend: Sale credit_amount calculated correctly with mixed payment (cash + credit)
Backend: Sale with 100% credit payment - credit_amount equals final_amount
Frontend: Customers page has Total Sales, Cash, Bank, Credit Balance columns
Frontend: Customers page shows Receive button for customers with credit balance ($5000.00 shown)
Frontend: Receive credit dialog opens with Amount input, Payment Mode select, and Receive Payment button
Frontend: Credit Report shows columns: Total, Discount, Final, Credit Given, Received, Remaining, Status
Frontend: Documents page has 'New type' input with '+ Add' button for custom document types
Frontend: Suppliers page works without errors - shows 'All Branches' for null branch_id
Frontend: Expenses page works without errors - shows 'No Branch' dropdown option
critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly converts empty strings to null for: branch_id, supplier_id, category, sub_category in create_supplier and create_expense endpoints
Customer balance tracking implemented with /api/customers-balance (all customers) and /api/customers/{id}/balance (single customer) endpoints
Credit report endpoint returns discount and final_amount fields for each credit sale
Category model supports type='document' for custom document type categories
Credit sale calculation correctly calculates credit_amount from payment_details where mode='credit'
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests: TEST_Supplier_Empty_Branch, TEST_Expense_Empty_IDs, TEST_Credit_Customer, TEST_AllCredit_Customer, TEST_ReceiveCredit_Customer
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 complete. Bug fixes verified: 1) Empty string to null conversion for branch_id, supplier_id, category, sub_category in suppliers and expenses - backend converts '' to null before storing, 2) Customer balance tracking - GET /api/customers-balance returns list with id, name, total_sales, cash, bank, credit_balance; GET /api/customers/{id}/balance returns detailed balance; Customers page shows balance columns and Receive button for customers with credit, 3) Credit report - GET /api/reports/credit-sales returns discount and final_amount fields; CreditReportPage shows Discount and Final columns, 4) Document type categories - POST /api/categories with type='document' works; DocumentsPage has 'New type' input with '+ Add' button. Existing test customers: 'Test Customer' with $5000 credit balance, 'Test UI Customer'.
